title: AH CopyCoords
description: Copy your coordinates to clipboard with a single click or change the dimension of the coordinates!
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f662153460fbbd388cf20a6264cd13e70af3bdf1.png)

## Overview

Copy your current coordinates into your clipboard or even change the dimension of the coordinates!

## Features

- Copy your current coordinates into your clibboard with a custom Keybind- default b. 

- Supporting MacOS, Windows and Linux

- Change the dimension of your coordinates, for example convert your Overworld Coords to Nether Coords - or the other way - simply cicle trough the dimensions and copy them with your key!

- You can change the format of the copied coordinates however you want! (You can also delete them)

![format config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2a5dff20320da39313272533b3dd9037e373734.png)
